economic_notes: Midnorth Development Corporation provides automotive, repair and construction services. Cross Lake Place operates a gas station. Tree Suns Junction Inc. holds Ponton Service Station (1997) Ltd. and My's Est. 98 Ltd. (restaurant), both off-reserve with no operations during the year. Cross Lake Mineral Exploration Inc. is a wholly owned business enterprise recorded under modified equity method.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to determine completeness of Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) liabilities under PS 3280, adopted prospectively April 1, 2022. Comparative figures restated (Note 19) — correction of an error added $1,495,255 to opening accumulated surplus. Capital lease obligations of $3,575,646 are separate from long-term debt. Pimicikamak Okimawin Trust receivable of $2,177,424 and Due from Pimicikamak Okimawin of $2,622,417 are included in financial assets. Hospital project restricted cash of $8,005,145 held for new hospital facility. CMHC replacement reserve underfunded by $1,863,379. ISC revenue is very large relative to budget ($60.9M budget vs $140.4M actual) — likely includes significant capital contributions for tangible capital assets. Prevention segment listed in notes but not in income statement totals. Midnorth Development Corporation fully consolidated as subsidiary.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
High ISC dependency (88.18%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
